since_last: 58% of 86 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.11%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 58% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.68% · BTC -2.93% · Gold -2.67% · Nasdaq100 +0.49%. 58% of 86 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.11%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.11%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at -1.01%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: UPST is the standout at +6.71%
cards.body: Leaders: UPST +6.71%, ZBRA +4.70%, INTU +3.60%, PUBM +3.56%, PINS +3.46%. Laggards: SMR -5.02%, OKLO -4.90%, OKLO -4.90%, BBAI -3.45%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.50% at $158.45
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.50% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
